_meta.description: MAGI Skill Definitions for OpenClaw Integration

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for information. Use when user asks to find, look up, or search for current information, news, or general knowledge.

query.description: The search query to look up

tools.name: deep_research
tools.description: Conduct in-depth research on a topic by aggregating multiple sources. Use for complex topics requiring comprehensive analysis.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch and extract content from a specific URL. Use when user provides a URL to read or analyze.

url.description: The URL to fetch content from

tools.name: analyze_image
tools.description: Analyze and describe an image using Melchior's vision capabilities. Use when user asks about image content, OCR, or visual analysis.

image_path.description: Absolute path to the image file

prompt.description: Specific question or instruction for image analysis (default: 'Describe this image in detail')

tools.name: summarize_text
tools.description: Summarize long text content using Balthasar. Use for condensing articles, documents, or lengthy responses.

tools.name: save_memory
tools.description: Save important information to long-term vector memory. Use when user explicitly asks to remember something or when important facts should be stored.

tools.name: recall_memory
tools.description: Recall relevant memories from vector database. Use when user asks 'what did I say about...' or to retrieve previously stored context.

tools.name: query_clients
tools.description: Search law firm clients by keyword. Use when user asks about clients, cases, or client information.

tools.name: add_client
tools.description: Add a new client to the law firm database. Use when user wants to register a new client.

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List upcoming meetings from calendar. Use when user asks about schedule, appointments, or upcoming events.

tools.name: book_meeting
tools.description: Book a new meeting or appointment. Use when user wants to schedule a meeting.

tools.name: legal_automation
tools.description: Execute legacy legal automation scripts (judgment search, court filing, etc.). Use for specialized legal tasks.

skill_name.description: Name of the legal skill to execute (e.g., 'search_judgment', 'court_filing')

args.description: Arguments to pass to the skill

tools.name: send_alert
tools.description: Send emergency alert via Red Phone (LINE + Discord). Use for critical notifications or when admin must be contacted immediately.

tools.name: create_skill
tools.description: Generate a new MAGI skill from description. Use when user wants to create a new automation or tool.

tools.name: melchior_search
tools.description: Perform web search via Melchior with Iron Dome security filtering. Use for safe, filtered search results.

tools.name: acquire_skill
tools.description: Automatically acquire a new skill: searches GitHub, downloads, analyzes with Iron Dome, installs if safe, or generates with MELCHIOR if not found. Use when user needs a new capability.

need.description: Description of the capability needed (e.g., 'process PDF files', 'manage calendar')

auto_generate.description: If true, generate skill with MELCHIOR when not found (default: true)

tools.name: autofix_codebase
tools.description: Autonomously scan and repair Python syntax issues in allowed code roots, then verify compilation. Use when user asks to auto-fix code.

target.description: Target root alias or path (default: code). Allowed aliases: code, magi

max_rounds.description: Maximum repair rounds per failing file (default: 2)

dry_run.description: If true, analyze and propose fixes without writing files

internalize_skill.description: If true, convert learned fixes into an internalized skill

tools.name: teach_casper
tools.description: Teach CASPER a new experience/tip and store it in AutoSkill knowledge base.

keywords.description: Optional keyword list for retrieval precision

tools.name: teach_casper_from_file
tools.description: Teach CASPER from a local file (line-based ingestion) to scale user-provided knowledge.

file_path.description: Absolute path to training file under allowed roots

tools.name: internalize_skill_knowledge
tools.description: Convert CASPER's learned knowledge into a runnable skill with action.py and SKILL.md.

keywords.description: Optional keyword filter for which memories to internalize

tools.name: list_core_change_pending
tools.description: List nightly council pending core changes that require admin approval.

tools.name: approve_core_change
tools.description: Approve a pending core change raised by nightly council.

tools.name: reject_core_change
tools.description: Reject a pending core change raised by nightly council.

tools.name: internalize_codebase_skills
tools.description: Convert CODE folder Python modules into functional skills with CI and auto stable/canary release.

force.description: Rebuild even if file hash unchanged

enable_release.description: Enable CI and release workflow (default: true)

tools.name: run_code_skill_cycle
tools.description: Execute automatic code maintenance cycle: auto-fix and codebase skill internalization.

tools.name: import_toolsai_auto_skill
tools.description: Import Toolsai auto-skill knowledge/experience into CASPER AutoSkill memory.

tools.name: tri_sage_translate
tools.description: Translate text via distributed tri-sage pipeline, preferring Melchior Qwen models.

mode.description: Translation mode: auto|full (default: auto). Use full for '不要摘要/完整翻譯'.

tools.name: tri_sage_generate_music
tools.description: Generate music track by Melchior-first pipeline, with Casper fallback audio synthesis.

tools.name: tri_sage_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file using tri-sage transcription route.

audio_path.description: Absolute local path to audio file

tools.name: run_code_file_review_automation
tools.description: Functional skill generated from CODE file `file_review_automation.py`. Supports function-call mode, module execution mode, and self-test mode.

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_code_judicial_automation_v2
tools.description: Functional skill generated from CODE file `judicial_automation_v2.py`. Supports function-call mode, module execution mode, and self-test mode.

tools.name: laf_login_smoke
tools.description: 法扶正式站登入冒煙測試：只登入驗證（不送出、不回報、不做案件操作）。回傳成功與截圖路徑。

headless.description: 是否使用無頭模式（預設 true）

base_url.description: 指定入口網址（預設正式站 https://lawyer.laf.org.tw）

mock_mode.description: 測試模式（避免卡在驗證碼；僅用於離線模擬站）

timeout_sec.description: 整體技能執行 timeout（預設 180 秒）

tools.name: osc_case_status
tools.description: 案件進度總覽（流程型技能）：盤點案件資料夾的書狀/通知/近期檔案，讀取 PDF（含掃描檔 OCR），並用「PDF 開庭通知 + DB calendar_events」彙整近期待開庭期；另可抓 legal_insights 實務見解。輸出會落地成 report.txt/manifest.json。

tools.name: run_osc_scan_cases
tools.description: OSC 拆分技能：掃描案件待辦（scan_cases），寫入 DB 或降級 queue；不刪檔。

tools.description: OSC 拆分技能：佇列補寫（queue_flush），把 pending queue 寫回 DB；不刪檔。

tools.description: OSC 拆分技能：建立/更新案件索引（index_cases），供降級/模糊搜尋使用。

tools.name: run_osc_db_smoke

tools.name: run_osc_orchestrator
tools.description: OSC 核心自動化（headless）：待辦解析/入庫/掃描/佇列；不刪檔，可降級。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_translator
tools.description: 完整翻譯（預設不摘要）並可自動輸出 TXT 到 /static/exports，方便用 LINE/DC 回傳。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py (e.g., translate {..json..})

tools.name: run_crawler_targets
tools.description: 管理每日爬蟲 URL 清單（持久化），並可寫入向量資料庫（run_daily）。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py (list|add|remove|run_daily)

tools.name: run_gmail_drafts
tools.description: 用 Gmail API 建立草稿（只存草稿、不寄出），供非 LAF 信件回覆流程使用。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py (create {..json..})

tools.name: run_file_review_orchestrator

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_transcript_downloader
tools.description: 筆錄同步技能：免驗證碼優先登入、下載新筆錄、重命名、歸檔與去重。

tools.name: run_pdf_namer

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_magi_autopilot
tools.description: 自動巡檢/夜間任務主流程技能（tick/nightly），整合 LAF/閱卷/筆錄/PDF/待辦/爬蟲。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_judgment_collector
tools.description: 判決與法規爬取技能：優先 Lawsnote，必要時回退司法院，並更新向量資料庫。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_laf_portal_automation

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_laf_refine_case
tools.description: 法扶案件精煉技能：清理重複案件、補齊欄位、標準化案件對應。

tools.name: run_file_review_sso

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_file_review_email_parse

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py

tools.name: run_file_review_captcha
tools.description: 閱卷驗證碼技能：本地 OCR 辨識與重試策略（必要時才人工介入）。

task.description: Task text to pass into action.py
